categories.label: STL File Sharing
categories.description: Platforms where the community shares free and paid 3D printable models

sites.name: Cults3D
sites.description: French marketplace for free and paid 3D print files with a strong designer community.

sites.name: Free3D
sites.description: Repository of free and premium 3D models including printable STL files.

sites.name: MakerWorld
sites.description: Bambu Lab's model sharing platform optimized for Bambu printers, with reward system.

sites.name: MyMiniFactory
sites.description: Curated library of free and paid models, with a focus on quality and print-guaranteed files.

sites.name: Printables
sites.description: Large free STL community backed by Prusa. Earn points for uploading and downloading models.

sites.name: Sketchfab
sites.description: 3D model viewer and marketplace with downloadable files, many printable.

sites.name: Thangs
sites.description: 3D model search engine and community with geometric search capabilities.

sites.name: Thingiverse
sites.description: One of the oldest and largest repositories of free 3D printable models, maintained by MakerBot.

sites.name: Yeggi
sites.description: Search engine that aggregates STL files from multiple platforms in one place.

categories.label: Manufacturers
categories.description: Official websites of 3D printer hardware manufacturers

sites.name: AnkerMake
sites.description: Anker's 3D printing brand offering fast, AI-assisted printers like the M5C.

sites.name: Artillery
sites.description: Budget-friendly FDM printers known for the Sidewinder and Genius series.

sites.name: Bambu Lab
sites.description: Fast-growing manufacturer known for high-speed multi-material printers like the X1 Carbon and P1S.

sites.name: Creality
sites.description: Chinese manufacturer offering budget-friendly printers like the Ender series and K1.

sites.name: Elegoo
sites.description: Popular brand for resin (MSLA) printers like the Mars and Saturn series.

sites.name: Flashforge
sites.description: Manufacturer of reliable dual-extrusion and education-focused FDM printers.

sites.name: Formlabs
sites.description: Professional-grade SLA and SLS resin printers widely used in dental and engineering.

sites.name: Phrozen
sites.description: Taiwanese resin printer manufacturer known for high-resolution Sonic series.

sites.name: Prusa Research
sites.description: Czech manufacturer of the legendary MK4 and XL printers, pioneers of open-source 3D printing.

sites.name: QIDI Tech
sites.description: Mid-range manufacturer offering fast enclosed printers with good value.

sites.name: Raise3D
sites.description: Industrial-grade FDM printers with large build volumes for professional use.

sites.name: Ultimaker (UltiMaker)
sites.description: Dutch company known for professional FDM printers used in enterprise environments.

categories.label: Blogs & News
categories.description: Blogs, news outlets, and editorial sites covering 3D printing

sites.name: 3D Printing Industry
sites.description: B2B-focused news covering enterprise additive manufacturing trends and research.

sites.name: 3DPrint.com
sites.description: Daily industry news covering 3D printing technologies, business, and research.

sites.name: All3DP
sites.description: Comprehensive 3D printing magazine with reviews, tutorials, and industry news.

sites.name: Fabbaloo
sites.description: Long-running blog with deep analysis of trends, products, and companies in additive manufacturing.

sites.name: Hackaday – 3D Printing
sites.description: Hackaday's 3D printing tag — creative projects, hacks, and community builds.

sites.name: Prusa Blog
sites.description: Official Prusa Research blog with deep technical articles, tutorials, and company news.

sites.name: Teaching Tech (YouTube)
sites.description: Calibration guides, printer reviews, and how-to videos for makers of all levels.

sites.name: Thomas Sanladerer (YouTube)
sites.description: In-depth reviews and tutorials on FDM printers and materials by a respected community creator.

categories.label: Communities & Forums
categories.description: Online communities, forums, and social spaces for 3D printing enthusiasts

sites.name: 3D Printing Stack Exchange
sites.description: Q&A site for technical questions about 3D printing, part of the Stack Exchange network.

sites.name: Bambu Lab Community
sites.description: Official Bambu Lab forum for user discussions, feature requests, and help.

sites.name: Printables Discord
sites.description: Official Discord server for the Printables community by Prusa.

sites.name: Prusa Forum
sites.description: Official Prusa Research forum for support, mods, and community discussion.

sites.name: r/3Dprinting
sites.description: The largest 3D printing subreddit with over 4 million members sharing prints, tips, and help.

sites.name: r/bambulab
sites.description: Community for Bambu Lab printer users — tips, prints, and troubleshooting.

sites.name: r/prusa3d
sites.description: Dedicated community for Prusa printer owners and enthusiasts.

sites.name: Reprap Forum
sites.description: The original open-source 3D printing forum, home to RepRap project discussions.

categories.label: Software & Slicers
categories.description: Slicers, design tools, and software used in the 3D printing workflow

sites.name: Bambu Handy
sites.description: Bambu Lab's mobile app for monitoring and controlling Bambu printers remotely.

sites.name: Bambu Studio
sites.description: Bambu Lab's official slicer based on PrusaSlicer with multi-material and cloud features.

sites.name: Blender
sites.description: Professional open-source 3D modeling suite, widely used to create printable models.

sites.name: Fusion 360
sites.description: Autodesk's CAD/CAM software popular for engineering and product design for printing.

sites.name: Meshmixer
sites.description: Free mesh editing and repair tool by Autodesk for fixing and preparing STL files.

sites.name: Octoprint
sites.description: Open-source web interface for remotely monitoring and controlling 3D printers.

sites.name: OrcaSlicer
sites.description: Community fork of Bambu Studio with enhanced calibration tools and printer support.

sites.name: PrusaSlicer
sites.description: Open-source, powerful slicer by Prusa Research supporting a wide range of printers.

sites.name: SuperSlicer
sites.description: Feature-rich fork of PrusaSlicer with extra calibration and print quality options.

sites.name: Tinkercad
sites.description: Browser-based beginner-friendly CAD tool by Autodesk, great for simple models.

sites.name: UltiMaker Cura
sites.description: The most popular free slicer, supporting hundreds of printer profiles.

categories.label: Filament & Materials
categories.description: Suppliers of filament, resin, and other 3D printing materials

sites.name: Bambu Filament
sites.description: Official Bambu Lab filament range with RFID-tagged spools for automatic profile loading.

sites.name: Colorfabb
sites.description: Dutch specialty filament brand offering premium blends, carbon fiber, and nGen.

sites.name: Elegoo Resin
sites.description: Elegoo's range of standard and ABS-like resins compatible with most MSLA printers.

sites.name: eSUN
sites.description: Chinese manufacturer of a wide range of affordable filaments and resins.

sites.name: Hatchbox
sites.description: Popular US-based filament brand offering reliable PLA, ABS, and PETG at affordable prices.

sites.name: Matterhackers
sites.description: US retailer for 3D printing supplies, filament, resins, and hardware.

sites.name: Overture
sites.description: Budget-friendly filament brand known for consistent PLA and PLA+ spools.

sites.name: PolyMaker
sites.description: Innovative filament brand known for specialty materials like PolyTerra and PolyMax.

sites.name: Prusament
sites.description: Premium quality filament manufactured by Prusa Research with tight tolerances.

sites.name: Siraya Tech
sites.description: Maker of engineering-grade resins with excellent mechanical properties.
